subject: Ethan's Slugma, a molten lava slug creature with an orange-red glowing body, with a trainer portrait inset in the upper right
description: A molten slug creature fills most of the card art, its body rendered in flowing orange, red, and yellow lava tones with a luminous quality suggesting internal heat. A small circular portrait of a young trainer — a boy wearing a cap — appears inset in the upper right corner, identifying this as a trainer-owned variant. The background is warm-toned and indistinct, dominated by heat haze or rocky terrain implied by the color temperature. The composition centers on the creature with the trainer inset as a secondary element. The lava texture of the creature's body gives the art a molten, semi-liquid feel.
foreground: Slugma creature with glowing lava body
background: Warm indistinct background with heat-toned colors; trainer portrait inset top-right
